summary: Tested Post-Payment Automation for €67 Analisi Strategica. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). Celery worker and beat are running correctly. The automation flow works: user registration → payment simulation → Celery tasks execution → database updates → email logs creation.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 instead of 404 for non-existent users - FIXED
Was returning 500 instead of 404 for non-existent users - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Systeme.io API integration is called but may fail without valid API key - system continues anyway (graceful degradation)
Telegram notifications are configured and working
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with pattern test.*.@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-payment automation fully functional. Celery worker and beat running on 'analisi_automation' queue. Test endpoints available: POST /api/webhooks/test-analisi-payment/{user_id} and GET /api/webhooks/test-automation-status/{user_id}. Systeme.io integration is called but may fail silently without valid API key.

automation_status.GET /api/webhooks/test-automation-status: ✅ Returns user, cliente_analisi, scheduled_emails, email_logs, automation_status

database_updates.clienti_analisi.email_benvenuto_inviata: ✅ Set to true after Celery task

fix_applied.description: Added HTTPException re-raise before generic Exception catch to properly return 404 status codes for non-existent users

mocked_apis.systeme_io: Called but may fail without valid API key - system continues gracefully
